title: Wizard CLI manifest
description: Shape of dist/skills/cli-manifest.json. Published alongside the manifest itself so downstream consumers (notably the wizard's prebuild) can validate the manifest's structure before snapshotting it. The wizard's CONTRIBUTING.md and context-mill's CONTRIBUTING.md cover the field semantics.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped when the manifest shape changes in a breaking way.

buildVersion.description: Context-mill release version that produced this manifest. May be 'dev', 'bootstrap', or 'empty-fallback' depending on the source.

buildTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the manifest was emitted.

surface.description: Where this skill appears in the wizard CLI surface.

command.description: User-typed word that registers this skill as a command. Required when surface is 'public'.

parentCommand.description: Optional parent command this skill nests under.
